description: Multiple PHP remote file inclusion vulnerabilities in Prototype of an PHP application 0.1 allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary PHP code via a URL in the path_inc parameter to (1) index.php in gestion/; (2) identification.php, (3) disconnect.php, (4) loginliste.php, (5) loginmodif.php, (6) index.php, and (7) ident.inc.php in ident/; (8) menuadministration.php and (9) menuprincipal.php in menu/; (10) param.inc.php in param/; (11) index.php in plugins/phpgacl/; and (12) index.php and (13) common.inc.php.
